staff assessment whether the resident states that life isn't worth living, wishes for death or attempts to harm self. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
155 D0500I2_STF_NGTV_STATE_FREQ_CD D0500I2_STF_NGTV_STATE_FREQ_CD D0500I2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Negative Statement Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident states that life isn't worth
